title: Changes in temperature and pH of wheat straw during its decomposition
abstract:
Temperature and pH are some of the important regulative factors in 1he break down and synthesis of organic matter in
soil and in manures. Temperature and pH affects the rate of chemical, particularly enzymatic reaction and it influences in part elective1y, the development of micro-organisms. The effect of temperature on the decomposition. of organic maHer in soil was studied by Aliev (1962) and Elkan.(1960)...
